title: Composition, Collaboration, and Dependency Boundaries · Language Clinic: Oop Delegation
summary: Connect catalog, lending policy, notification, clock, and persistence collaborators without hidden globals. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop delegation increment in a composed circulation service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Delegate behavior through a narrow collaborator API without leaking its complete representation.
Model has-a relationships with explicit ownership, lifetime, and mutation responsibilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
